image:image.image:title: Sam Altman — Oil caricature by Tony Parsons
image:image.image:caption: Oil caricature portrait of Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI, painted in oil on canvas by Tony Parsons, 2025

image:image.image:title: Rory Sutherland — Oil caricature by Tony Parsons
image:image.image:caption: Oil caricature portrait of Rory Sutherland, Vice Chairman of Ogilvy, painted by Tony Parsons, 2024

image:image.image:title: Zach Polanski — Oil caricature by Tony Parsons
image:image.image:caption: Oil caricature portrait of Zach Polanski, Brighton politician, painted by Tony Parsons, 2025

image:image.image:title: Gods of Caricature — Oil painting by Tony Parsons
image:image.image:caption: Oil painting depicting four masters of caricature as a Mount Rushmore monument, by Tony Parsons
